   "source": [
    "import networkx as nx \n",
    "from tqdm import tqdm\n",
    "\n",
    "G = nx.DiGraph()\n",
    "\n",
    "target_gene = end_node\n",
    "n_top = 5\n",
    "next_layer = [target_gene]\n",
    "edges = []\n",
    "\n",
    "for i in tqdm(range(5)):  # n hops\n",
    "    \n",
    "    curr_layer = next_layer.copy()\n",
    "\n",
    "    for node in curr_layer:\n",
    "        if node in G.nodes():\n",
    "            continue\n",
    "\n",
    "        upstream_df = gradients[node].loc[cois]\n",
    "        upstream_df.columns = [x.split('_')[1] for x in upstream_df.columns]\n",
    "        tmp = upstream_df.mean(axis=0).sort_values(ascending=False, key=abs)\n",
    "        tmp = tmp[tmp.abs() > 1e-6]\n",
    "        top_nodes = tmp.head(n_top)\n",
    "\n",
    "        edges.extend([(top_node, node, weight) for top_node, weight in top_nodes.items()])\n",
    "        next_layer.extend(top_nodes.index)\n",
    "        G.add_node(node, layer=4-i+1)"
   ]
  },

    "from collections import defaultdict\n",
    "\n",
    "pos = {}\n",
    "nodes_by_layer = defaultdict(list)\n",
    "for node, data in G.nodes(data=True):\n",
    "    nodes_by_layer[data['layer']].append(node)\n",
    "\n",
    "for layer, nodes in nodes_by_layer.items():\n",
    "    n = len(nodes)\n",
    "    # Spread nodes evenly from y = -0.5 to y = +0.5 for each layer (can tweak spread)\n",
    "    y_positions = np.linspace(-0.5, 0.5, n) if n > 1 else [0.0]\n",
    "    for node, y in zip(nodes, y_positions):\n",
    "        pos[node] = (layer, y)\n"
   ]

    "\n",
    "# manual layout\n",
    "# pos = {node: (G.nodes[node]['layer'], random.uniform(-0.1, 0.1)) for node in G.nodes()}\n",
    "\n",
    "node_colors = []\n",
    "for node in G.nodes():\n",
    "    if node in network_genes and node in scenic_genes:\n",
    "        node_colors.append('green')\n",
    "    elif node in network_genes:\n",
    "        node_colors.append('royalblue')\n",
    "    elif node in scenic_genes:\n",
    "        node_colors.append('orange')\n",
    "    else: \n",
    "        # not in either network or scenic\n",
    "        node_colors.append('skyblue')\n",
    "\n",
    "# Draw nodes with the assigned colors\n",
    "nx.draw_networkx_nodes(\n",
    "    G, pos, \n",
    "    node_size=900, \n",
    "    node_color=node_colors, \n",
    "    edgecolors='black', \n",
    "    linewidths=0.4,\n",
    "    alpha=0.6,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Prepare edge weights and edge colors based on sign of weight\n",
    "edges_data = list(G.edges(data=True))\n",
    "edges_weights = []\n",
    "edges_colors = []\n",
    "for _, _, d in edges_data:\n",
    "    w = d['weight'] if isinstance(d, dict) and 'weight' in d else 1.0\n",
    "    edges_weights.append(w)\n",
    "    edges_colors.append(\"gray\")\n",
    "    # if w < 0:\n",
    "    #     edges_colors.append(\"skyblue\")\n",
    "    # else:\n",
    "    #     edges_colors.append(\"salmon\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Normalize weights for line thickness\n",
    "max_w = max(abs(float(w)) for w in edges_weights) if edges_weights else 1.0\n",
    "widths = [abs(float(w))/(max_w+1e-10)*5+0.5 for w in edges_weights]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Draw curved edges to prevent overlap using connectionstyle\n",
    "# Create a list of connection styles for each edge: alternate sign for nice spacings if multiple edges between same nodes\n",
    "import itertools\n",
    "connectionstyles = []\n",
    "# Cycle through two arc rad values (positive and negative) to split bidirectional/parallel edges\n",
    "for idx, (u, v, d) in enumerate(edges_data):\n",
    "    # Alternate the direction of curve for visually adjacent edges\n",
    "    arc_rad = 0.2 if idx % 2 == 0 else -0.2\n",
    "    connectionstyles.append(f\"arc3,rad={arc_rad}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "for i, ((u, v, d), color, width, connstyle) in enumerate(zip(edges_data, edges_colors, widths, connectionstyles)):\n",
    "    nx.draw_networkx_edges(\n",
    "        G, pos,\n",
    "        edgelist=[(u, v)],\n",
    "        width=width,\n",
    "        edge_color=color,\n",
    "        arrowstyle='-|>',\n",
    "        arrowsize=15,\n",
    "        alpha=0.7,\n",
    "        connectionstyle=connstyle,\n",
    "        min_source_margin=10,\n",
    "        min_target_margin=16\n",
    "    )\n",
    "\n",
    "# Draw node labels - capitalized and italicized\n",
    "labels = {node: f\"$\\mathit{{{node.capitalize()}}}$\" for node in G.nodes()}\n",
    "nx.draw_networkx_labels(G, pos, labels=labels, font_size=14)\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib.patches as mpatches\n",
    "from matplotlib.lines import Line2D\n",
    "import matplotlib\n",
    "\n",
    "# Legend for nodes\n",
    "node_patches = [\n",

    "    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='royalblue', edgecolor='black', label='CoreNET only'),\n",
    "    mpatches.Patch(facecolor='orange', edgecolor='black', label='SCENIC only'),\n",

  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 35,
   "id": "eedbe990",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "dfr_th2.to_csv(f'tables/mouse_lymph_slideseq_D5_1_regulators{suffix}.csv')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 36,
   "id": "8253dd05",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "network_genes = set(network_genes)\n",
    "scenic_genes = set(scenic_genes)\n",
    "extended_genes= set(extended_genes)\n",
    "groom_genes = set(groom_genes)\n",
    "top_modulators = set(dfr_th2.index)\n",
    "all_genes = set(adata.var_names)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 37,
   "id": "e0ab9deb",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1800x1800 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from scipy.stats import hypergeom\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "# Compute overlap sizes\n",
    "N = len(all_genes)  # background/universe size\n",
    "net_n = len(network_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "extended_n = len(extended_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "scenic_n = len(scenic_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "groom_n = len(groom_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "mod_n = len(top_modulators)\n",
    "\n",
    "net_mod = len(network_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "extended_mod = len(extended_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "scenic_mod = len(scenic_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "groom_mod = len(groom_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate p-values using hypergeometric test\n",
    "pval_network = hypergeom.sf(net_mod - 1, N, net_n, mod_n)\n",
    "pval_extended = hypergeom.sf(extended_mod - 1, N, extended_n, mod_n)\n",
    "pval_scenic = hypergeom.sf(scenic_mod - 1, N, scenic_n, mod_n)\n",
    "pval_groom = hypergeom.sf(groom_mod - 1, N, groom_n, mod_n)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate fold enrichment\n",
    "fold_network = (net_mod / mod_n) / (net_n / N)\n",
    "fold_extended = (extended_mod / mod_n) / (extended_n / N)\n",
    "fold_scenic = (scenic_mod / mod_n) / (scenic_n / N)\n",
    "fold_groom = (groom_mod / mod_n) / (groom_n / N)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create barplot\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 6), dpi=300)\n",
    "\n",
    "categories = ['CoreNET', 'CoreNET\\nextended', 'SCENIC', 'Groom']\n",
    "overlaps = [net_mod, extended_mod, scenic_mod, groom_mod]\n",
    "pvalues = [pval_network, pval_extended, pval_scenic, pval_groom]\n",
    "folds = [fold_network, fold_extended, fold_scenic, fold_groom]\n",
    "\n",
    "bars = ax.bar(\n",
    "    categories, overlaps, \n",
    "    color=['royalblue', 'skyblue', 'yellow', 'salmon'], \n",
    "    edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, width=0.6, alpha=0.9)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add value labels on bars\n",
    "for i, (val, pval, fold) in enumerate(zip(overlaps, pvalues, folds)):\n",
    "    # Number of genes\n",
    "    ax.text(i, val + 0.3, f'n = {val}', ha='center', va='bottom', \n",
    "            fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Significance stars\n",
    "    if pval < 0.001:\n",
    "        sig_text = '***'\n",
    "    elif pval < 0.01:\n",
    "        sig_text = '**'\n",
    "    elif pval < 0.05:\n",
    "        sig_text = '*'\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        sig_text = 'ns'\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # P-value and significance\n",
    "    ax.text(i, val + 1.2, f'p = {pval:.2e}\\n{sig_text}', \n",
    "            ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, style='italic')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Fold enrichment at bottom\n",
    "    ax.text(i, 1.5, f'{fold:.1f}×\\nenriched', \n",
    "            ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9)\n",
    "\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel('Genes in Top 30 Modulators', fontsize=12)\n",
    "ax.set_title('Gene Set Overlap with Top Modulators\\nfor Tfh Activity', \n",
    "             fontsize=13, pad=20)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Remove top and right spines\n",
    "ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
    "ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
    "ax.spines['left'].set_linewidth(1.5)\n",
    "ax.spines['bottom'].set_linewidth(1.5)\n",
    "ax.set_yticks(range(0, 31, 5))\n",
    "ax.set_yticklabels([0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30])\n",
    "ax.tick_params(axis='x', labelsize=14)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add subtitle with context\n",
    "ax.text(0.5, -0.15, f'SpaceTravLR trained genes: {N}', \n",
    "        transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', fontsize=12, style='italic', color='#666666')\n",
    "        \n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'figures/mouse_lymph_slideseq_D5_1_hypergeom_barplot{suffix}.svg', \n",

    "plt.show()"
   ]

===== Scripts/Figure5/human_spatial_scRNA_analysis_5b.R =====
library(zellkonverter)
library(Seurat)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(ggplot2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(escape)
library(ggplot2)
library(BiocParallel)
library(rogme)
library(Cairo)


#Subset to groups of interest
###########################################################################
seurat_obj <- readRDS('../../Data/sc_rds/spatial_human_tonsil_no_naive.RSD')

seurat_obj@meta.data$cell_type
seurat_obj@reductions$spatial
FeaturePlot(seurat_obj,
            #features   = "CCR3",
            reduction  = "spatial",
            group.by = 'cell_type',
            order      = TRUE,
            pt.size    = 0.5,
            label      = TRUE,
            label.size = 3,
            repel      = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "darkblue") +
  ggtitle("CCR3")

DimPlot(seurat_obj,
            reduction  = "spatial",
            group.by = 'cell_type',
            order      = TRUE,
            pt.size    = 0.5,
            label      = TRUE,
            label.size = 3,
            repel      = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("CCR3")
print(seurat_obj@meta.data)
unique(seurat_obj$cell_type)

subset_seurat <- subset(seurat_obj, subset = cell_type %in% c("T_follicular_helper", "T_CD4"))

subset_seurat[["RNA"]] <- subset_seurat[["originalexp"]]
#subset_seurat[["originalexp"]] <- NULL
DefaultAssay(subset_seurat) <- "RNA"

seurat_genes <- rownames(subset_seurat)
print(rownames(subset_seurat))

DimPlot(subset_seurat, reduction = 'spatial', group.by = "cell_type", label = TRUE) +
  ggtitle("UMAP - All Cell Types")


Assays(subset_seurat)
DefaultAssay(subset_seurat) <- "originalexp"

subset_seurat[["originalexp"]]@data[1:5, 1:5]

saveRDS(subset_seurat, file = "../../Data/sc_rds/spatial_human_tonsil_no_naive_subset.RSD")
subset_seurat <- readRDS("../../Data/sc_rds/spatial_human_tonsil_no_naive_subset.RSD")

#Load in the sets of interest - I had a bunch of different .csv, .gmt, .txt etc
###########################################################################
vinuesa_df  <-read.csv("../../Data/literature_sets/vinuesa_list.csv")
vinuesa <- as.list(vinuesa_df$'Genes')
vinuesa_genes <- intersect(unlist(vinuesa), seurat_genes)

tfh_review_df  <- read.csv("../../Data/literature_sets/TFH_review_list.csv")
tfh_review <- as.list(tfh_review_df$'Genes')
tfh_review_genes <- intersect(unlist(tfh_review), seurat_genes)

CoreNet_PPI_df  <- read.csv('../../Data/PPS_1_significant_gene_list.csv')
CoreNet_PPI <- as.list(CoreNet_PPI_df$'Genes')

CoreNet_PPI_genes <- intersect(unlist(CoreNet_PPI), seurat_genes)


###########################################################################

#Make a list of all gene lists of interest
###########################################################################
pathway_names <- c("CoreNet-PPI", " Vinuesa 2016", "Hart 2022")
gene_set <- list(
  CoreNet_PPI = CoreNet_PPI_genes,
  Vinuesa_2016 = vinuesa_genes,
  Hart_2022 = tfh_review_genes
)

###########################################################################

#Run ssGSEA
###########################################################################
ssg_seurat = runEscape(subset_seurat, method = "ssGSEA", gene.sets = gene_set, min.size=2,
                       new.assay.name = "escape.ssGSEA", normalize = FALSE)

DefaultAssay(ssg_seurat)  <- "escape.ssGSEA"
row.names(ssg_seurat@assays$escape.ssGSEA)

#subset_seurat$cell_type <- factor(subset_seurat$cell_type, levels = c("T_follicular_helper", "T_CD4"))

saveRDS(ssg_seurat, file = "../../Data/sc_rds/human_tonsil_spatial_ssGSEA_analysis_Tfh.RSD")

my_comparison <- list(c("Tfh", "CD4 T-Cell"))

# Convert underscores to hyphens to match ssGSEA output (Anything with a hyphen in the pathway gets changed by ssGSEA from _ to -)
valid_gene_sets <- names(gene_set)
converted_names <- gsub("_", "-", valid_gene_sets)

# Check which ones exist in the ssGSEA data
existing_sets <- rownames(GetAssayData(ssg_seurat, assay = "escape.ssGSEA", layer = "data"))
valid_gene_sets <- valid_gene_sets[converted_names %in% existing_sets]
###########################################################################


#Plot spatial
###########################################################################
plot1 <- FeaturePlot(
  ssg_seurat,
  features = "PPI",  
  reduction = "spatial",
  cols = c("cyan2","salmon")
)


plot2 <- DimPlot(subset_seurat, reduction = 'spatial', group.by = "cell_type", label = FALSE)

plot1


ggsave(filename ="outputs/Tfh_vs_CD4T_xy_PPI_brighter_reverse.pdf",
       plot = plot1,
       device = "pdf",
       width = 4,
       height = 4)
###########################################################################

# Prepare results list
results_list <- list()

# Get ssGSEA enrichment matrix once
ssgsea_mat <- GetAssayData(ssg_seurat, assay = "escape.ssGSEA", slot = "data")

for (gene_name in valid_gene_sets) {
  cat("Plotting:", gene_name, "\n")
  
  converted_name <- gsub("_", "-", gene_name)
  
  # Check if gene set is present in assay
  if (!(converted_name %in% rownames(ssgsea_mat))) {
    cat("  Skipping - gene set not found\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Build data frame of enrichment scores and group labels
  df <- data.frame(
    score = ssgsea_mat[converted_name, ],
    group = ssg_seurat$cell_type
  )
  df <- df[df$group %in% c("T_CD4", "T_follicular_helper"), ]
  df$group <- factor(df$group, levels = c("T_CD4", "T_follicular_helper"))
  
  # Skip if invalid data
  if (all(is.na(df$score)) || length(unique(df$score)) <= 1) {
    cat("  Skipping - no variability\n")
    next
  }
  
  # Run Cliff's Delta
  cliff <- tryCatch({
    cidv2(
      df[df$group == "T_CD4", "score"],
      df[df$group == "T_follicular_helper", "score"],
      alpha = 0.05
    )[c("d.hat", "p.value")]
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("  Skipping - cidv2 failed\n")
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(cliff)) next
  
  # Compute group means
  avg_nontfh <- mean(df$score[df$group == "T_CD4"], na.rm = TRUE)
  avg_tfh <- mean(df$score[df$group == "T_follicular_helper"], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # Save result for summary
  results_list[[gene_name]] <- data.frame(
    gene_set = gene_name,
    d.hat = cliff[["d.hat"]],
    p.value = cliff[["p.value"]],
    mean_nonTfh = avg_nontfh,
    mean_Tfh = avg_tfh
  )
  
  # Plot label
  delta_label <- paste0("Cliffs~Delta==", -1*round(cliff[["d.hat"]], 2))
  
  # then in your ggplot:
  annotate("text",
           x = 1.5,
           y = max(df$score, na.rm = TRUE),
           label = delta_label,
           parse = TRUE,
           vjust = 0.5,
           size = 6.5) 
  
  df <- as.data.frame(t(as.matrix(GetAssayData(ssg_seurat, assay = "escape.ssGSEA", layer = "data"))))
  df$cell_type <- ssg_seurat$cell_type
  df <- df[, c(converted_name, "cell_type")]
  colnames(df)[1] <- "score"
  
  df_for_points <- df %>%
    group_by(cell_type) %>%
    sample_frac(1.0) %>%  # Sample 10% of each group
    ungroup()
  
  # Rename levels first
  levels(df$cell_type)[levels(df$cell_type) == "T_follicular_helper"] <- "Tfh"
  levels(df$cell_type)[levels(df$cell_type) == "T_CD4"] <- "CD4 T-Cell"
  
  # Set the desired level order
  df$cell_type <- factor(df$cell_type, levels = c("Tfh", "CD4 T-Cell"))
  
  # Repeat for df_for_points
  levels(df_for_points$cell_type)[levels(df_for_points$cell_type) == "T_follicular_helper"] <- "Tfh"
  levels(df_for_points$cell_type)[levels(df_for_points$cell_type) == "T_CD4"] <- "CD4 T-Cell"
  
  df_for_points$cell_type <- factor(df_for_points$cell_type, levels = c("Tfh", "CD4 T-Cell"))
  
  gs <- ggplot(df, aes(x = cell_type, y = score, fill = cell_type)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.8, width = 0.8) +
    geom_jitter(data = df_for_points, width = 0.2, size = 1, alpha = 0.1) +
    #scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Spectral") +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = "Cell Type", y = paste0(gene_name, " Enrichment Score")) +
    stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparison, 
                       method = "wilcox.test", 
                       label = "p.signif",
                       size=6.5) +
    annotate("text", x = 1.5, y = max(df$score, na.rm = TRUE), 
             label = delta_label, vjust = 0.5, size = 6.5) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 18),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 18)
    )
  
  gs
  
  # Save plot
  ggsave(filename = paste0("outputs/Tfh_vs_CD4T_spatial_", gene_name, "boxplot_smaller.pdf"),
         plot = gs,
         device = "pdf",
         width = 7,
         height = 5)
}

# Write summary CSV
if (length(results_list) > 0) {
  summary_df <- do.call(rbind, results_list)
  write.csv(summary_df,
            "outputs/cliffs_delta_summary_Tfh_vs_CD4T_spatial.csv",
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Summary CSV saved.\n")
} else {
  cat("No valid results to write to summary.\n")
}

   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 45,
   "id": "158ba8f6",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "dfr_th2.to_csv(f'tables/mouse_lymph_visiumHD_Tfh_regulators{suffix}.csv')"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 46,
   "id": "8253dd05",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "network_genes = set(network_genes)\n",
    "extended_genes = set(extended_genes)\n",
    "scenic_genes = set(scenic_genes)\n",
    "groom_genes = set(groom_genes)\n",
    "top_modulators = set(dfr_th2.index)\n",
    "all_genes = set(adata.var_names)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 47,
   "id": "e0ab9deb",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 1800x1800 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from scipy.stats import hypergeom\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "\n",
    "# Compute overlap sizes\n",
    "N = len(all_genes)  # background/universe size\n",
    "net_n = len(network_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "extended_n = len(extended_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "scenic_n = len(scenic_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "groom_n = len(groom_genes & all_genes)\n",
    "mod_n = len(top_modulators)\n",
    "\n",
    "net_mod = len(network_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "extended_mod = len(extended_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "scenic_mod = len(scenic_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "groom_mod = len(groom_genes & top_modulators)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate p-values using hypergeometric test\n",
    "pval_network = hypergeom.sf(net_mod - 1, N, net_n, mod_n)\n",
    "pval_extended = hypergeom.sf(extended_mod - 1, N, extended_n, mod_n)\n",
    "pval_scenic = hypergeom.sf(scenic_mod - 1, N, scenic_n, mod_n)\n",
    "pval_groom = hypergeom.sf(groom_mod - 1, N, groom_n, mod_n)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Calculate fold enrichment\n",
    "fold_network = (net_mod / mod_n) / (net_n / N)\n",
    "fold_extended = (extended_mod / mod_n) / (extended_n / N)\n",
    "fold_scenic = (scenic_mod / mod_n) / (scenic_n / N)\n",
    "fold_groom = (groom_mod / mod_n) / (groom_n / N)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Create barplot\n",
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6, 6), dpi=300)\n",
    "\n",
    "categories = ['CoreNET', 'CoreNET\\nextended', 'SCENIC', 'Groom']\n",
    "overlaps = [net_mod, extended_mod, scenic_mod, groom_mod]\n",
    "pvalues = [pval_network, pval_extended, pval_scenic, pval_groom]\n",
    "folds = [fold_network, fold_extended, fold_scenic, fold_groom]\n",
    "\n",
    "bars = ax.bar(\n",
    "    categories, overlaps, \n",
    "    color=['royalblue', 'skyblue', 'yellow', 'salmon'], \n",
    "    edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5, width=0.6, alpha=0.9)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add value labels on bars\n",
    "for i, (val, pval, fold) in enumerate(zip(overlaps, pvalues, folds)):\n",
    "    # Number of genes\n",
    "    ax.text(i, val + 0.3, f'n = {val}', ha='center', va='bottom', \n",
    "            fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Significance stars\n",
    "    if pval < 0.001:\n",
    "        sig_text = '***'\n",
    "    elif pval < 0.01:\n",
    "        sig_text = '**'\n",
    "    elif pval < 0.05:\n",
    "        sig_text = '*'\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        sig_text = 'ns'\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # P-value and significance\n",
    "    ax.text(i, val + 1.2, f'p = {pval:.2e}\\n{sig_text}', \n",
    "            ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9, style='italic')\n",
    "    \n",
    "    # Fold enrichment at bottom\n",
    "    ax.text(i, 1.5, f'{fold:.1f}×\\nenriched', \n",
    "            ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9)\n",
    "\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel('Genes in Top 30 Modulators', fontsize=12)\n",
    "ax.set_title('Gene Set Overlap with Top Modulators\\nfor Tfh Activity', \n",
    "             fontsize=13, pad=20)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Remove top and right spines\n",
    "ax.spines['top'].set_visible(False)\n",
    "ax.spines['right'].set_visible(False)\n",
    "ax.spines['left'].set_linewidth(1.5)\n",
    "ax.spines['bottom'].set_linewidth(1.5)\n",
    "ax.set_yticks(range(0, 31, 5))\n",
    "ax.set_yticklabels([0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30])\n",
    "ax.tick_params(axis='x', labelsize=14)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Add subtitle with context\n",
    "ax.text(0.5, -0.15, f'SpaceTravLR trained genes: {N}', \n",
    "        transform=ax.transAxes, ha='center', fontsize=12, style='italic', color='#666666')\n",
    "        \n",
    "plt.tight_layout()\n",
    "plt.savefig(f'figures/mouse_lymph_visiumHD_Tfh_hypergeom_barplot{suffix}.svg', \n",
    "            dpi=300, bbox_inches='tight', transparent=True, format='svg')\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {

    "th2_expr = np.where(adata.uns['cell_thresholds'].loc[beta.index, receptors] > 0, th2_expr, 0)\n",
    "env_expr = adata.uns['received_ligands'].loc[dfr.index, ligands]\n",
    "env_expr = np.where(adata.uns['cell_thresholds'].loc[dfr.index, ligands] > 0, env_expr, 0)\n",
    "\n",
    "wbetas = beta * th2_expr * env_expr\n",
